title: T-014 — Wiring: standard_cost.approved outbox handler writes items.cost_per_kg + emits to 12-REPORTING (§13.1, §13.2)
prompt:
# T-014 — standard_cost.approved outbox handler wiring

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §13.1 Event subscriptions (`standard_cost.approved` → `handle_std_cost_approved`); §13.2 cost_per_kg dual ownership (10-FIN writes per D-FIN-9).
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Register an `apps/worker` consumer that subscribes to the `finance.standard_cost.approved` outbox event and:
1. Updates `items.cost_per_kg` for the affected item_id to `approved.total_cost / uom_kg_factor` (with finance_worker role binding so T-010 trigger admits the write).
2. Re-publishes a downstream event `finance.cost_per_kg.changed` for 12-REPORTING MV refresh.
3. Idempotent: if items.cost_per_kg already equals the approved value or the event's idempotency_key has been processed, no-op.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/worker/src/finance/std-cost-approved-handler.ts`:
   - Consumer signature `handleStdCostApproved(event: OutboxEvent<FinanceStdCostApprovedPayload>): Promise<void>` per packages/outbox patterns.
   - Set worker session: `app.current_role='finance_worker'` (T-010 trigger gate).
   - Recompute kg-factor: if `uom='KG'` then factor=1; else lookup `items.uom_kg_factor` (assumes existing column from 03-TECHNICAL items master); use Drizzle.
   - Write items.cost_per_kg = approved.total_cost / factor under withOrgContext(event.org_id).
   - Emit downstream `finance.cost_per_kg.changed` outbox event with payload `{ item_id, old_value, new_value, source_standard_cost_id, idempotency_key: uuid v7 }`.
   - Idempotency: check `processed_events` table (foundation T-111 contract) before write; insert tracking row on success.
2. Worker registration `apps/worker/src/registry.ts`: register handler under event_type='finance.standard_cost.approved' with at-least-once delivery semantics.
3. Failure handling: transient errors retry per foundation worker retry policy; schema/permission errors move to DLQ (use generic outbox DLQ table from foundation, NOT the d365_finance_dlq which is for D365-specific failures).

## Files
- apps/worker/src/finance/std-cost-approved-handler.ts [create]
- apps/worker/src/registry.ts [modify]
- apps/worker/src/finance/__tests__/std-cost-approved-handler.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given event {item_id, total_cost: 12.50, currency_id, uom:'KG'}, when worker runs, then items.cost_per_kg for that item equals 12.50.
- Given event consumed twice, when second invocation runs, then no UPDATE occurs (idempotent).
- Given worker session lacks app.current_role='finance_worker', when handler tries UPDATE, then T-010 trigger rejects with D-FIN-9 exception — handler surfaces as hard error (not retry).
- Given write succeeds, when finance_outbox_events queried, then row with event_type='finance.cost_per_kg.changed' exists with old_value/new_value/source payload. AND given unknown item_id, when handler runs, then structured log error and DLQ-eligible mark (no infinite retry).
_(AC count consolidated from 5→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: std-cost-approved-handler.test.ts seeds items + emits a fixture event; asserts UPDATE happens, idempotent on replay, downstream event emitted, role-gating works.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/worker vitest run finance/std-cost-approved-handler`.

## Risk red lines
- D365 integration is strictly export-only (R15 anti-corruption contract per `_foundation/contracts/`) — MUST NOT mutate `factory_release_state` or any other canonical Monopilot state.
- Do not skip the `app.current_role='finance_worker'` binding — without it the T-010 trigger blocks the write.
- Do not emit the downstream event before the items UPDATE commits (atomic outbox).
- Do not retry on schema/permission errors (move to DLQ to avoid hammering the trigger).
- Do not handle this in a synchronous Server Action — the consumer is asynchronous by design (post-commit).
- Do not bypass the idempotency check (12-REPORTING MV would refresh redundantly).

pipeline_inputs.description: Worker subscriber for finance.standard_cost.approved → write items.cost_per_kg under finance_worker role + emit downstream cost_per_kg.changed event for 12-REPORTING.
